name: @noidmejs/atomkit
description: Headless, SSR-safe, atom-based visual builder with a declarative query language (AQL) + AI bridge. Every atom carries its own styling, data-binding, accessibility, analytics and security as plain data — author by DSL or AI (drag-and-drop editor on the roadmap); render a JSON document to React on the server or the client.
author: noidmejs

scripts.test: node test/query.test.mjs && node test/render.test.mjs && node test/security.test.mjs && node test/schema.test.mjs && node test/instrument.test.mjs && node test/expr.test.mjs && node test/gates.test.mjs && node test/regressions.test.mjs
scripts.gates: node tools/gates/governance-gate.mjs; node tools/gates/gate-wiring.mjs; node tools/gates/gate-ratchet.mjs
